headline: Meta monetizes AI through paid subscriptions across social platforms
body: Meta is launching subscription tiers for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp that bundle AI capabilities as premium features. For healthcare organizations, this signals how consumer AI monetization models may influence enterprise adoption patterns and vendor negotiations. Meta's positioning of AI as a paid service differentiator could reshape expectations around clinical AI tool pricing and feature access. Healthcare IT leaders should monitor whether this subscription model extends to Meta's enterprise offerings, as it may impact the total cost of ownership for AI-powered EHR integrations or patient engagement tools.
